description: A physics-based rocket soccer game where players charge boosts to launch the ball into the opposite goal. Similar to RocketGoal.io with gravity, friction, and skill-based gameplay.
aiUsage: AI was used to create the physics engine for ball movement, gravity, collision detection, and goal detection. AI assisted in designing the game mechanics, boost charging system, and overall gameplay experience.
credits: Game Concept: RocketGoal.io Inspired Physics Soccer
UI Design: Dark theme with neon accents
